title: Build + wire the remaining COMPONENT_INVENTORY components (P0.13)
business_reason: 12 of 20 required design-system components were specified but not built (KpiCard, FilterBar, ApprovalPanel, AuditTimeline, SafeSummaryCard, SignedDownloadButton, ErrorState, LoadingState, Modal, Drawer, Stepper, Toast, MaskedValue, ReasonBox, HighRiskActionPanel). Build them, wire the high-value ones, and make the gate verify availability so they can't go missing again.

design.presentational: app/components/design.tsx += KpiCard, LoadingState, ErrorState, FilterBar, Stepper, ApprovalPanel, AuditTimeline, SafeSummaryCard, HighRiskActionPanel, ReasonBox (no hooks → server-renderable).
design.interactive: app/components/design-interactive.tsx (use client) = Modal (focus + Escape + backdrop), Drawer, Toast (useToasts + ToastViewport), MaskedValue (reveal calls onReveal for audit), SignedDownloadButton (requests a signed URL, opens it).
design.wiring: ModuleTable now renders <LoadingState> (skeleton) while loading + <EmptyState> when empty; DashboardView renders <KpiCard> (replacing raw .kpi divs + the legacy --finverse-* tone colors).
design.gate: check_design_conformance.py now also reads COMPONENT_INVENTORY.json and fails if any required component is not exported (EQUIV maps AppShell→PortalShell, DataTable→ModuleTable, Toast→ToastViewport). 0 violations.

param_14.question: Are all the design-system components available and used?
param_14.answer: Yes — all 20 required COMPONENT_INVENTORY components are built (presentational in design.tsx, interactive in design-interactive.tsx) on the Versa tokens. The high-value ones are wired (LoadingState/EmptyState in every table, KpiCard on dashboards), and the conformance gate now fails if any required component is missing, so the set can't regress.
param_14.answer_source: design.tsx, design-interactive.tsx, design.css, ModuleTable, DashboardView, check_design_conformance.py
param_14.security_implications: MaskedValue masks PII by default + calls onReveal so a reveal can be audited; SignedDownloadButton never exposes a raw path; ErrorState shows no internal details; loading state has aria-busy + sr-only text (a11y).
param_14.approval_implications: ApprovalPanel surfaces maker-checker state; HighRiskActionPanel frames high-risk actions per DESIGN_SYSTEM §7.
param_14.downstream_dependencies: wire ApprovalPanel/AuditTimeline/MaskedValue/Drawer into specific screens; school-scoped pickers; public-verification design; a11y audit.
